cases.name: adversarial_fragile_overclaim
cases.description: Planted failure: 12 weak background items dominate, fragile winner, broad legitimacy-vacuum hypothesis. Audit must flag broad_winning_hypothesis and cap at grade C.

cases.name: adversarial_calibration_mismatch
cases.description: Planted failure: synthesis assigns strongly_supported to a hypothesis with posterior 0.30, below the STRONG_SUPPORT_FLOOR of 0.50. Audit must flag the calibration mismatch.

cases.name: french_revolution_real
cases.description: Real E2E output on French Revolution text (Wikipedia). Critic ablation pass (22 findings). Should grade B with no overclaim flagged.
